task_completion.description: Agent successfully logged into OSCAR EMR.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OSCAR EMR main dashboard or Demographic Search page is visible, indicating the agent bypassed the login screen using the provided credentials.

task_completion.description: Agent navigated to the Add Patient / Add Demographic screen.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A blank or partially filled 'Add Demographic' or 'Register Patient' form is visible in the OSCAR EMR interface.

task_completion.description: Agent entered the patient's name, date of birth, and sex.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The form fields for First Name ('Emily'), Last Name ('Nakamura'), Date of Birth ('1991-08-14' or equivalent format), and Sex ('F' or 'Female') are filled correctly.

task_completion.description: Agent entered the patient's address, phone number, and email.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The form fields for Address ('350 Bay Street'), City ('Toronto'), Province ('ON' or 'Ontario'), Postal Code ('M5H 2S6'), Phone ('416-555-0201'), and Email ('emily.nakamura@email.ca') are filled correctly.

task_completion.description: Agent entered the patient's health card information.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The form field for Health Card Number is filled with '9001234567' and the province is set to 'ON' or 'Ontario'.

task_completion.description: Agent saved the new patient record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A confirmation screen, success message, or the 'Master Demographic' record page for Emily Nakamura is visible, proving the form was successfully submitted and saved.

integrity.description: Agent used a web browser to interact with the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser (like Firefox or Chrome) is visible in the screenshots, navigating to localhost:8080.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the genuine OSCAR EMR graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the actual OSCAR EMR web interface, not a text editor, mock HTML file, or plain text form.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows showing direct MySQL/MariaDB 'INSERT' commands or curl requests to the backend.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires registering a patient in OSCAR EMR via the web GUI (http://localhost:8080/oscar/login.jsp). Credentials: oscardoc / oscar / PIN: 1117. Patient Details to verify in the form or final record: Name: Emily Nakamura. DOB: 1991-08-14. Sex: F. Address: 350 Bay Street, Toronto, ON M5H 2S6. Phone: 416-555-0201. Email: emily.nakamura@email.ca. Health Card: 9001234567 (ON). The final step must show the record being saved, typically resulting in a Master Demographic view for the new patient.
